caption:
Last February on Asahi Dake, Hokkaido's highest peak. You skin about 40 minutes past the steaming fumaroles to reach the good lines — and the whole way up, the volcano is quietly smoking beside you.

That week gave us three days in a row with over a metre of fresh snow. A morning like this, blue sky over all of it, is the reward for showing up when the storm ends.

We're planning next winter's small-group trips now. Send us a message if you want to hear how the weeks work.

#japow #hokkaido #asahidake #backcountryskiing #skitouring #powderskiing #japanskiing #daisetsuzan
